title: hyoscyamus bohemicus var. pallidus
intro: Hyoscyamus bohemicus var. pallidus, also known as a variety of henbane, is a plant species that belongs to the nightshade family and is characterized by its pale-colored flowers and leaves. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, sedative, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Hyoscyamus bohemicus var. pallidus include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and pain, as well as its ability to reduce muscle spasms and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although caution is advised due to its potential toxicity and the risk of overdose.
